Name: MATERIAL_EX_PARAM_ST
Description: Determines the configuration of material parameters.

Fields.Name: Material Param Name
Fields.Description: Set the parameter name of the material. Up to 31 characters.

Fields.Name: Material ID
Fields.Description: The material expansion paramter ID to use for NPCs. -1 for all materials.

Fields.Name: Material Param Value: R
Fields.Description: The material parameter value used for the red component of a color.

Fields.Name: Material Param Value: G
Fields.Description: The material parameter value used for the green component of a color.

Fields.Name: Material Param Value: B
Fields.Description: The material parameter value used for the blue component of a color.

Fields.Name: Material Param Value: Alpha
Fields.Description: The material parameter value used for the alpha component of a color.

Fields.Name: Material Param Value: Intensity
Fields.Description: The material parameter value used for intensity.
